title: Farris, Laura - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State for Victims and Safeguarding jointly in the Home Office and Ministry of Justice - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Farris left her role at the Home Office and Ministry of Justice on 5 July 2024.  UK Head of Litigation Communications, FGS Global  Ms Farris sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with FGS Global. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in November 2024 and the role was taken up in December 2024. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here. "
